message.content: I need to call the GitHub API. My token is ghp_ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcde12345
I can help you use the GitHub API. To keep your token safe, consider storing it as GITHUB_TOKEN in ~/.claude/.env and referencing it as $GITHUB_TOKEN in commands.
Also I have an anthropic key: sk-ant-api03-AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz01234567890abcdef-ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP-qrstuvwxyz01234567890ABCDEF
That looks like an Anthropic API key. Please add it to ~/.claude/.env as ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and avoid sharing it in chat.
